subject: A Kindler trainer class figure, a worker in a hard hat crouching beside a fire, feeding it with a long implement
description: A figure in work clothes and a hard hat crouches beside an open fire, extending a long pole or stick into the flames. The scene is warm-toned with orange and amber fire dominating the right side of the composition. The figure's posture is low and focused, suggesting active labor. Smoke and embers are suggested by the warm hazy atmosphere. The setting appears to be outdoors near a fire pit or kiln.
foreground: crouching worker in hard hat extending a long implement into open flames
background: warm hazy fire-lit environment, smoke and embers
